product_context.one_line_value: Improve first-touch outbound quality with deterministic controls.
proof_points: Teams use structured guardrails to reduce drift across reps.
Managers get faster visibility into risky messaging patterns.

raw_research.deep_research_paste: SignalForge announced a 2026 outbound quality initiative and opened 12 SDR roles in Q1. Leadership tied pipeline quality to quarterly targets.
raw_research.company_notes: Corsearch notes: consistent SDR messaging quality is a board-level focus.
